tests.command: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run)

lint.note: next lint has no committed ESLint config; invoking it drops into an interactive 'How would you like to configure ESLint?' setup prompt rather than running a check. No .eslintrc*/eslint.config.* exists in app/. Treated as NO_LINT per the NO_LINT tolerance — not a gate this story is required to satisfy.

notes: S1 (link-model-expiry-migration) is already landed in the working tree (uncommitted): app/src/lib/marmot/inviteLinkStorage.ts, app/src/components/groups/GenerateInviteLinkModal.tsx, and app/tests/unit/inviteLinkLifecycle.test.ts are already modified/added prior to this story starting.
